title: Empire (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Imperial}}
{{Main|Politics#Empire}}
'''Empire''' could refer to the following items:

==[[In-universe]]==
===Empires===
Alongside the various [[Sith Empire (disambiguation)|'''Sith Empires''']], there have been numerous other '''empires''':

====[[Canon]]====
*The [[Infinite Empire]], an empire that existed before the [[Imperial Era]]
*The [[Ubdurians' empire]].
*The [[Chiss Ascendancy]], a libertarian empire in the [[Unknown Regions]]
*The [[Zygerrian Slave Empire]] was a slave empire that was set up over a thousand years before the [[Clone Wars]].
*[[Jabba's criminal empire|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]] was the crime syndicate of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure|Jabba]] the [[Hutt]], who based himself in his [[Boba Fett's Palace|palace]] on [[Tatooine]].
*The [[Galactic Empire]] (later known as the Old Empire) that was reorganized from the [[Galactic Republic]] at the end of the [[Clone Wars]].

=====Ambiguous canon=====
*The [[Empire (feudal)|Empire]], the [[Feudalism|feudal]] government involved with the [[Sith rebellion]] {{C|in ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]''}}
*The [[T-Empire]] of [[Am]] and [[Karre]]. {{C|in ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]''}}

====[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]====
*The [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], created by the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] sometime before [[30,000 BBY]]; ended in [[25,200 BBY]].
*The [[Hutt Empire]], from c. [[25,200 BBY]]-[[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]].
*[[Xim's empire]], which lasted from [[25,130 BBY]] to [[25,100 BBY]].
*The [[Azure Imperium]], a [[Pre-Republic era|pre-Republic]] empire centered on [[Axum]].
*The [[Tapani Empire]], extending from 7,328 BBY to 1,582 BBY.
*The [[Eternal Empire]], led by [[Tenebrae|Vitiate]] after he became disillusioned with his [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]; was later reorganized in [[3630 BBY]] into the [[Eternal Alliance]].
*[[Paecian Empire]], existing up to [[2992 BBY]] when it collapsed.
*[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba's criminal empire]]
*[[Gardulla the Elder's criminal empire]]
*The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], led by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] as the replacement for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]
**The [[Imperial Remnant]], a statelet formed in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] from the Galactic Empire after its collapse.
**The [[Fel Empire]], destroyed in [[130 ABY]], restored in [[138 ABY]].
***The [[Empire-in-exile]], a remnant of the Fel Empire from 130 ABY to 138 ABY.
**[[Fist of the Empire (group)|Fist of the Empire]]
*The [[Empire of the Hand]], established in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], which fell between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]].
*The [[Restored Empire]], a renegade faction of the [[Imperial Remnant]] aiming for full reestablishment of the first Galactic Empire, formed in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and dissolved in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].
*The [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]], the government of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] that was run by the [[Supreme Overlord]] and the [[Intendant caste]] [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]–[[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].
*[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], following a coup d'état in the Fel Empire in [[130 ABY]], ended in 138 ABY.
*The [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]], the empire of the [[Ssi-ruu]]k, until [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].
*The [[Esselian Empire]] of the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]].
*The [[Hiromi Empire]].
*The [[Vagaari Empire]].
*The [[Corellian empire]]
*The [[Atrisian Empire]].
*The [[Proliferan Empire]]
*The [[Zygerrian Slave Empire/Legends|Zygerrian Slave Empire]]
*The ''[[Fist of the Empire]], a ship

Prior to the formation of the Galactic Republic, several star systems/star sectors had been empires, also known as moffs, with the political title of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] (and to an extent, [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]) originating from the warlords who ran these empires peaceably joining the Galactic Republic.

===Other===
*[[Empire (Imperial II prototype)|''Empire'']], an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Feyet Kiez]].

==Out-of-universe==
Several ''[[Star Wars]]'' publications may also be referred to as '''Empire''':

*''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'', a series of comics about the Galactic Empire
*[[Fist of the Empire (article)|Fist of the Empire]], a [[Star Wars Insider]] article
*[[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)]], the version of the Galactic Empire in the comic serial ''The Star Wars''
*''Empire'', a shortened name for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]

{{Disambig}}
